component.name: TW Update Assistant
component.summary: Know when it is safe to run a Tumbleweed zypper dup

description.p: TW Update Assistant watches openSUSE Tumbleweed in the background and tells you when a distribution upgrade is safe. It runs the package manager's own dry run, then classifies the result: a green light means the transaction resolves cleanly — no dependency conflicts, nothing removed, downgraded or held back, no codecs leaving Packman, and no package-name collisions that would swap an installed program for an unrelated one.

The tray icon only appears when a safe update is ready. The update itself runs in a terminal embedded in the app window and always asks for your password; the background checks are read-only. Pending Flatpak updates are shown as well.
